actionable_feedback: Provide an untruncated export of the workbook or visible-formula CSV/snippet for the Normalization, Decision, Remediation, and Sensitivity sheets (include cell addresses and formulas) so verifiers can validate row-level formulas and cached vs executable results.

Clarify and document the four-to-three metric mapping rationale (why stable_flag is combined with energy_error_pct into third_metric), include the explicit spreadsheet formulas used to compute first_metric, second_metric, energy_error_norm, stable_flag_norm, and third_metric, and include example cell references mapping to the packet rows.

Disambiguate O3: explicitly state whether O3 is an absolute normalized-point change or a relative (%) change and update workbook formulas accordingly. Provide the exact formula that applies O1, O2, and O3 to the normalized components and recompute remediation outcomes.

Include the explicit per-option costs and the exact arithmetic/formula used to compute combination totals (show cell refs). Recompute allowed/disallowed combinations and document any changes, especially those near the $60,000 budget boundary.

Fix grader metadata inconsistency: remove duplication of ri_sensitivity_remediation in both passed_criteria and failed_criteria, regenerate grader_result and deterministically recompute aggregated scores/fields.

Document tie-breaking and numeric precision rules (rounding policy) used when scores are exactly at thresholds or within sensitivity margins and surface them in solver_settings.md and the workbook header.

Regenerate artifacts (workbook and solver_settings.md) and re-run deterministic precheck so that the artifact preview is untruncated and verifiers can re-evaluate. Attach the new workbook SHA256 in metadata.

In solver_settings.md, add a small reproducibility appendix listing the precise cell ranges (Normalization rows, Decision score cells, Remediation application cells) used in the main computations and a short worked example for R2 and R4 showing remediation math.

feedback_summary: Baseline artifacts are present and largely correct, but verification is impeded by a truncated artifact preview and three main issues: (1) internal grader metadata inconsistency where ri_sensitivity_remediation appears both passed and failed; (2) ambiguous four-to-three metric normalization mapping (stable_flag combined with energy_error_pct) that is marked 'needs_review' and needs justification and visible formulas; (3) ambiguous remediation option O3 interpretation (percent vs absolute normalized points) and near-budget combination-cost arithmetic that reduce reproducibility. A formula row-offset defect was identified in the workbook generator and already patched in the build script; regenerate and provide visible-formula exports so verifiers can confirm executable formulas.

recommended_files_to_attach_in_revision: visible-formula CSV/snippet for Normalization sheet (with formulas and cell refs)
visible-formula CSV/snippet for Remediation sheet (with formulas and cell refs)
visible-formula CSV/snippet for Decision sheet (with formulas and cell refs)
